title: Misconfigured CORS Policy
description: Request replay validation observed a permissive cross-origin policy on an unauthenticated surface.
impact: Overly broad cross-origin access can expose sensitive API responses or enable browser-based abuse paths.
likelihood: High when wildcard or reflected origin handling is present on externally reachable routes.
recommendations: Restrict Access-Control-Allow-Origin to approved origins only.
Avoid credentialed CORS responses to broad or reflected origins.
Review cross-origin behavior on API and administrative routes.
